justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially misinterpreted the user's unusual phrasing "depart on Wednesday and arrive by 9:15" as a request for an appointment finishing by 9:15 AM on the current Wednesday, requiring clarification from the user.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent only reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternative options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was mostly efficient, with the agent quickly processing the user's corrected time preference in the second turn.
justifications.customer_experience: The initial misunderstanding of the user's temporal request created a minor friction point, but the agent recovered well once the user clarified.
